article_title: Nintendo's Tomodachi Life revival ships after a nine-year development cycle
summary: Submission needs expansion and the PR branch must be cleaned before merge

findings.message: Body too short for News: 164 words (minimum 200)
PR branch contains unrelated submission files
findings.details: PR #955 is titled and branched for the Tomodachi Life submission, but it also includes src/content/submissions/2026-04/2026-04-19T19-16-45Z_rust-195-adds-cfg_select-extends-if-let-guards-and.json and src/content/submissions/2026-04/2026-04-19T19-16-40Z_india-sets-up-aigeg-to-centralize-ai-governance-an.json. Those belong to other review flows, and the India PR (#958) has already been merged. Merging #955 as-is would create a contaminated merge.

content_preview.title: Nintendo's Tomodachi Life revival ships after a nine-year development cycle
content_preview.summary: Nintendo says Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream launched on April 16, with development starting around 2017 and the game rebuilt around user-generated content.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Nintendo says *Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream* launched on April 16 for Nintendo Switch, and that it is also playable on Nintendo Switch 2, according to the company's launch announcement ([Nintendo](https://www.nintendo.com/us/whatsnew/tomodachi-life-living-the-dream-direct-spotlights-quirky-fun-with-player-made-mii-characters-game-launches-on-nintendo-switch-april-16/)). Nintendo also describes the game as the first new Tomodachi Life entry in more than 10 years and says players ...

recommendations: Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
Expand content to at least 200 words for News
Clean the PR branch so it contains only the intended Tomodachi Life submission before resubmitting for merge

editor_notes.content_quality: The sourcing is solid and the core facts are accurate, but the submission is too short for the News category and reads more like a brief than a publication-ready article.
editor_notes.source_verification: I read all three listed sources directly. Nintendo's launch announcement supports the April 16 launch date, the Switch and Switch 2 playability, and the 'first new entry in more than 10 years' framing. Nintendo's Ask the Developer interview supports the around-2017 development start and the rebuilt-from-the-ground-up framing. TechRadar supports the approximately nine-year development cycle and user-generated-content emphasis.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: The factual claims in the current draft align with the listed sources.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and straightforward. No obvious overstatement.
editor_notes.originality: Originality check passed for this Tomodachi Life launch and development-timeline angle.
concerns: The body is below the minimum length expected for a News submission.
The PR is structurally invalid because it contains unrelated submission files in addition to the intended article.
recommendations: Expand the body to at least 200 words with one additional sourced paragraph, likely covering why Nintendo rebuilt the series and how the new UGC focus changes the formula.
Remove the unrelated Rust and India submission files from PR #955 and keep only the Tomodachi Life submission.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Request changes. The story is viable, but it needs a fuller body and a clean branch before it can be merged.
